title: Airtable data layer
description: src/lib/airtable.ts: build-time REST fetch via AIRTABLE_TOKEN+AIRTABLE_BASE_ID. Map Employers + Graduate Programs. Filter to records where Last Verified is set. Derive facet options from data.

title: Scaffold Astro project
description: package.json, astro.config, tsconfig, base layout, global.css with Swiss/dense/mono design tokens. Build in /Users/tate.carson/other_websites/audio-opportunities.

title: Audio Directory website (Astro + Airtable)
description: Build the Audio Directory Astro site from the Swiss/dense design, backed live by Airtable (Employers + Graduate Programs). Only include records with a Last Verified date. Functional client-side filtering.

title: Fix help modal hidden behind detail panel
description: Help overlay and detail panel both have z-index 50; with a company open, '? How to read this' opens underneath and appears broken. Raise help panel z-index and make detail panel ignore Escape while help is open (both currently close at once). global.css + directory.ts.

title: Tokenize directory search + clearer empty state
description: Search is a single-substring match: 'video games' returns 0 even though Games has 22 employers. Split the query into tokens and require each token to match. Also the empty state always blames filters ('No employers match the current filters') even when search is the cause — make it name the query and suggest fewer words / reset. src/scripts/directory.ts matchesSearch() and apply().

title: Add Entry Path facet to employers sidebar
description: Students' #1 question (who hires new grads?) is only visible per-company in the detail panel. Surface entry path (Open to new grads / Experience first / Grad school recommended / Grad school required) as a sidebar facet. Data: derive per-employer from its sectors' guidance (Employer.gettingIn in src/lib/airtable.ts). Add data-entrypath to rows, new FacetGroup, extend data-dims, add URL alias (?path=).

title: Tighten program-to-sector matching to avoid generic specialization noise
description: Program detail currently maps sectors from any overlapping specialization, which makes broad labels like Research generate unrelated sectors such as AI Music for acoustics-oriented programs. Refine the reverse-match logic so generic specializations do not dominate results and the related sectors stay useful to students.

title: UI: 'Getting in' block in detail panel
description: Add a 'Getting in' section to the employer detail panel beside the minors block: entry-path badge + Path Note per sector, plus 'Grad paths' listing the sector's Grad Specializations as links to the Programs page (deep-linked filter). Include the data in the data-detail payload; render in DetailPanel.astro + directory.ts. Omit when the sector has no Sectors-table entry.

title: Data layer: getSectors() + join to employers
description: src/lib/airtable.ts: add Sector interface + getSectors() (filter by Last Verified). Build sector -> {entryPath, note, gradSpecializations} index and attach to each Employer by sector (array when multi-sector). Mirror the existing minors join.

title: Airtable: create Sectors table + schema
description: New table 'Sectors' in base appyqRTTdm4p0Ze0P. Fields: Sector (single line, mirrors Employers Sector names), Entry Path (singleSelect: Open to new grads / Experience first / Grad school recommended / Grad school required), Path Note (long text, one student-facing sentence), Grad Specializations (multipleSelects mirroring Graduate Programs > Specialization), Last Verified (date display gate).
notes: Created the Sectors table and seeded 31 draft rows, but the Airtable connector refused to create the Last Verified date field due connector schema validation on type=date. Table id: tblDHjmmPWBaj6igS. Remaining work is to add Last Verified as a date field and then Tate can verify rows.

title: Sector entry-path + grad pathways
description: Help students judge whether a sector is reachable straight out of DSU vs needs experience or grad school, and map sectors to grad-program specializations. New Airtable 'Sectors' table (Entry Path, Path Note, Grad Specializations, Last Verified) drives a 'Getting in' block in the employer detail panel plus a 'How to read this' explainer modal. Per-sector granularity; 4 entry-path buckets.

title: Responsive / mobile layout
description: Site looks bad on mobile. Make topbar stack, collapse the filter sidebar behind a toggle, let the data table scroll / hide low-priority columns, wrap the footer, and make the detail panel full-width on small screens.

title: Fix Netlify secret-scan false positive
description: Netlify deploy fails after Astro build because repository files include an Airtable token-shaped placeholder in .env.example. Replace secret-like example values with scanner-safe placeholders and document that real credentials must be set only in Netlify environment variables.

title: Sort toggle (Default / A–Z) appears to do nothing
description: Clicking the A-Z / Default sort toggle has no visible effect. Likely because records are already sorted alphabetically by name at build time in src/lib/airtable.ts (.sort by name), so 'Default' order == 'A-Z' order. Decide: make Default a distinct order (e.g. by Last Verified desc, or original Airtable order) so the toggle visibly changes the list, or remove the toggle. Verify aria-pressed state also updates.

comments.author: Tate Carsson
comments.text: Resolution: remove the Default/A–Z sort toggle entirely (YAGNI — table is already alphabetical from the build sort; user doesn't want the feature).

title: Search bar
description: Text search input that filters table rows by name/institution/HQ/sector, combined (AND) with facet filters. Updates live counts and 'showing X of Y'.

title: Row detail sidebar/modal
description: Clicking a table row opens a detail sidebar or modal showing richer Airtable fields the dense table omits. Employers: Notes, Entry-Level Roles, Internship Program, Handshake Status, Career URL, Last Verified. Programs: Notes, Duration, Application Deadline, Funding, Program URL, full Specialization/Region, Last Verified. Fields already fetched/mapped in src/lib/airtable.ts; work is a panel component + open/close handler in src/scripts/directory.ts.

title: Client-side filtering island
description: Vanilla JS: facet checkboxes + A-Z sort filter rows via data-attrs, live-update counts and 'Showing X of Y'.

title: Programs page
description: programs.astro: Graduate Programs tab with analogous table (Program/Institution, Degree, Specialization, Region, Funding, Deadline) and matching filters.

title: Employers page + table UI
description: index.astro: header tabs, filter sidebar (Sector/Size/Geography facets w/ counts), dense table rows (rank, avatar initials, company+sector tags, HQ, size, geography), footer.

title: Add .nvmrc so local dev picks a supported Node
description: Machine default Node is v16 (nvm); Astro 6 requires >=22.12 so plain npm run dev fails. Add .nvmrc with 24 and a README note.

title: Automate site rebuilds on Airtable changes
description: Site is static; Airtable edits stay invisible until a Netlify rebuild. Add an Airtable automation hitting a Netlify build hook, or a scheduled nightly build. Requires Netlify dashboard access (Tate).

title: Sync filter/search state to URL (shareable views)
description: Deep links in (?sector=X) work but checking boxes never updates the URL, so filtered views can't be shared or survive refresh. Mirror checked facets + search query to query string with history.replaceState; extend applyQueryFilters to read multiple values and q. directory.ts.

title: Make row sector tags clickable to filter
description: Sector chips in table rows look interactive but do nothing; students click them expecting to filter. Clicking a tag should toggle the matching sector facet checkbox (stopPropagation so the detail panel doesn't open). Add pointer/hover affordance. directory.ts + global.css.

title: Retire 'Music Tech' sector; add 'Audio Hardware' and re-tag employers
description:
Review found that the 'Music Tech' sector in the Audio Careers Airtable base (appyqRTTdm4p0Ze0P) is a catch-all: 17 employers span hardware, software, streaming, medical devices, and AI with no shared career path. It conflates a DOMAIN label with the rest of the taxonomy, which is otherwise consistent functions/contexts. Decision: retire 'Music Tech' and distribute its members, adding a new 'Audio Hardware' sector to absorb the device companies that currently have no home.

Affected tables (all use the Sector multipleSelects option set, which must stay in sync):
- Employers (tblvb6D40R0SIlkrw, field 'Sector' fldaPqk03U0UF6Rqr)
- Sectors (tblDHjmmPWBaj6igS, guidance rows incl. the 'Music Tech' row recnbRTBOREpNpN50)
- Minors (tbl7naiwE8VdSLYAx, 'Relevant Sectors' fldseUbrwVaMH5mPx)
- Graduate Programs 'Specialization' may reference sector-like names — verify.

RE-TAG MAPPING (Employers currently tagged 'Music Tech'):
- Sonos, Bose Automotive, Sennheiser, Shure, Jabra / GN, Logitech, Cochlear -> add 'Audio Hardware'; drop 'Music Tech' (keep their other existing tags e.g. Automotive, AV, Hearing Health, Audio Software/Tools)
- Ableton, Waves Audio -> 'Audio Software/Tools' (drop Music Tech)
- Spotify -> 'AI Music' (MIR/AI-for-music R&D); drop Music Tech
- Apple Music (audio engineering) -> rename/merge into single 'Apple' record; tag 'Audio Hardware' + 'Audio Software/Tools' + 'Spatial & Immersive Audio'; drop Music Tech. NOTE: a second record 'Apple (Spatial Audio / Logic Pro)' already exists -> merge the two into one 'Apple'.
- ElevenLabs -> drop Music Tech (already has Generative & AI Audio, Audiobooks, Audio Engineering)
- Peloton -> drop Music Tech; reassign to 'Other' or a fitness/connected sector (decide during work)
- Xperi (DTS), THX -> drop Music Tech (already Spatial & Immersive Audio); confirm they don't need another tag
- Harman Automotive -> drop Music Tech (already Audio Software/Tools, Automotive)

OTHER ACTIONS:
- Add 'Audio Hardware' choice to the Sector option set; create a matching guidance row in the Sectors table (Entry Path, Path Note, Grad Specializations, Last Verified gate).
- Create an 'Audio Hardware' guidance row; migrate/retire the existing 'Music Tech' Sectors row (recnbRTBOREpNpN50).
- After all employers are re-tagged off 'Music Tech', remove the 'Music Tech' choice from the option set (verify zero usages across ALL tables first).
- Update Minors 'Relevant Sectors' references away from 'Music Tech'.

CONFIRMED DECISIONS:
- New sector name: 'Audio Hardware'.
- Keep BOTH 'Spatial & Immersive Audio' and 'VR/AR' (zero overlap; distinct paths — format/mix craft vs XR/sim runtimes). No merge.

OPEN / DECIDE DURING WORK:
- Peloton's correct sector.
- Whether Ableton/Waves keep a secondary tag.
- Optional: rename 'VR/AR' -> 'XR & Simulation' (cosmetic; most members are sim/defense).
acceptance_criteria: No employer is tagged 'Music Tech'; 'Music Tech' choice removed from all Sector option sets across Employers/Sectors/Minors; 'Audio Hardware' choice added and applied to Sonos, Bose, Sennheiser, Shure, Jabra/GN, Logitech, Cochlear, Apple; 'Audio Hardware' guidance row exists in Sectors table; the two Apple records merged into one; Last Verified gates respected so nothing goes live unverified.
notes:
DONE (programmatic, 2026-06-12):
- Created 'Audio Hardware' option in Employers Sector + Minors Relevant Sectors (via typecast write).
- Re-tagged all 16 non-Apple Music-Tech employers per mapping; Employers now 0 Music Tech.
- Merged the two Apple records into one 'Apple' (rec1KHZxA6Mn1Gs0p); deleted dup recYRctlld5In5dDn; tagged Audio Hardware + Audio Software/Tools + Spatial & Immersive + Audio Engineering.
- Audio Hardware roster (8): Apple, Sonos, Sennheiser, Shure, Jabra/GN, Logitech, Bose Automotive, Cochlear.
- Re-tagged 3 Minors off Music Tech (CS Minor -> Audio Hardware; Entrepreneurial & Mobile App Dev -> dropped); Minors now 0 Music Tech.
- Repurposed the orphaned Sectors guidance row (recnbRTBOREpNpN50) into 'Audio Hardware' with new Entry Path/Path Note/Grad Specializations; CLEARED Last Verified so it stays off-site until Tate reviews.
- Kept BOTH Spatial & Immersive Audio and VR/AR (zero overlap).

MANUAL STEPS REMAINING FOR TATE (cannot be done via Airtable MCP — update_field only edits formulas, not select choices):
1. Delete the now-empty 'Music Tech' choice from the Employers 'Sector' option set AND the Minors 'Relevant Sectors' option set (both at 0 usage, safe).
2. Review the new 'Audio Hardware' guidance row copy, then set Last Verified to publish it.
3. NOTE: 'Music Tech' still exists (correctly) as a Grad Specialization in Sectors/Graduate Programs — that's the academic-field meaning, intentionally left. Optional cosmetic: rename VR/AR -> 'XR & Simulation'.
close_reason: Programmatic re-tagging complete: Music Tech retired across Employers (16 re-tagged + Apple merged) and Minors (3 re-tagged); Audio Hardware sector created with 8 employers and a guidance row (Last Verified cleared for review). Two manual UI steps remain for Tate (delete empty Music Tech option in both option sets; verify+publish Audio Hardware guidance row) — documented in notes. Both option sets at 0 usage.

title: Show related job sectors in program detail panel
description: Students may land on the Graduate Programs page first. Add a section in the program detail drawer that points back to relevant employer/job sectors based on the program's specializations so the programs view also helps students understand where a degree can lead.

title: Differentiate program institution from specialization tags
description: Programs rows currently render the institution name with the same tag styling as specialization chips, which makes the school read like another specialization. Update the programs table UI so the institution is visually distinct from specialization tags while preserving the existing compact layout.

title: Programs deep-link by specialization (?spec=)
description: Programs page reads a ?spec= query param and pre-checks the matching Specialization facet on load, so the detail panel's grad-path links land on a filtered Programs view. Small enhancement to directory.ts.

title: UI: 'How to read this' explainer modal
description: A help modal opened from a '?' / 'How to read this' button in the top bar. Explains: sectors, the 4 entry-path labels, and that minors + grad programs bridge gaps. Reuse detail-panel/modal styling. Optional: auto-open on first visit via localStorage.

title: Airtable: pre-fill draft Sector rows
description: Seed one draft row per Sector option with a proposed Entry Path, a one-line Path Note, and Grad Specializations. Leave Last Verified blank for Tate to confirm. Examples: Acoustics Consulting=Grad school required (MS in acoustics); Hearing Health & Audiology=Grad school required; Games/Podcast/Live Sound=Open to new grads; Sonic Branding/Post-Production=Experience first; Spatial & Immersive / Music Tech R&D=Grad school recommended.

title: Dedupe Airtable base records
description: After merging the current feature branch to main, inspect the Audio Directory Airtable base for duplicate records, remove exact or clearly duplicate rows, and document what was changed.
close_reason: Merged feat/suggested-minors into main and deduped Airtable base: removed 6 clear duplicate Employer records after preserving useful fields; Graduate Programs and Minors had no duplicate groups.

title: Improve Lighthouse score excluding PWA
description: Use the saved Lighthouse report to identify score-impacting non-PWA findings, apply minimal code fixes, validate with build and local checks, and ignore PWA installability/service-worker findings by request.
close_reason: Fixed non-PWA Lighthouse findings: removed render-blocking remote font, improved contrast and text legibility, and removed initial non-crawlable detail anchor.

title: Address actionable CodeRabbit comments from PR 9
description: Verify PR 9 CodeRabbit findings against current code, apply only still-valid minimal fixes in .beads/issues.jsonl, src/lib/airtable.ts, and src/scripts/directory.ts, validate with repository checks, and summarize skipped comments with reasons.
close_reason: Verified PR 9 comments, fixed valid issues, and validated with build; bd doctor unavailable in embedded mode.

title: Research: career sectors unlocked by DSD + minor combinations
description: Explore additional career sectors that combinations of Digital Sound Design + a minor open up (e.g. DSD+CS -> audio tools/DSP engineering; DSD+Biology -> bioacoustics research; DSD+Business -> studio ownership; DSD+Spanish -> localization). Identify any NEW sectors worth adding to the Employers directory and propose employers. Output: list of candidate sectors + rationale + sample employers.

title: UI: 'Suggested DSU minors' block in detail panel
description: src/pages/index.astro: add minors[] (name, why, url) to each row's data-detail payload. src/components/DetailPanel.astro + src/scripts/directory.ts: render a 'Suggested DSU minors' section with linked minor names (catalog URL) + why line; omit when empty. Verify with preview.
close_reason: Added minors to data-detail payload (index.astro), 'Suggested DSU minors' block render in directory.ts, styles in global.css. Verified payloads + render code in bundle.

title: Airtable: pre-fill verified minor rows + sector mappings
description: Populate Minors table from the verified mapping table in the design doc (CS, AI&ML, Applied Math, Network&Security, Project Mgmt, Digital Forensics, Physics, Biology, Spanish, English for New Media, Communication Studies, English, Video Production, Digital Content Creation, Entrepreneurial Studies, Marketing, Mobile App Dev, High-Performance Computing). Add Why It Helps + catalog URLs (catoid=44 poids in design notes). Leave Last Verified BLANK for Tate to set. Respect flags: exclude Educational Technology, Cyber Operations, animation minors.
close_reason: Populated 18 verified minors with Relevant Sectors mappings + Why It Helps + catalog URLs; Last Verified left blank per design

title: Data layer: getMinors() + join to employers by sector
description: src/lib/airtable.ts: add Minor interface + getMinors() (filter by Last Verified, reuse names()). Build sector->Minor[] index and attach matched minors to each Employer by intersecting sectors. Snapshot fallback: add 'Minors' to src/data/snapshot.json.
close_reason: Added Minor interface + getMinors() (safe, never throws) and per-employer sector-intersection join in src/lib/airtable.ts. Verified via dev snapshot: minors baked into payloads, Last Verified gate enforced.

title: Airtable: create Minors table + schema
description: In base appyqRTTdm4p0Ze0P add table 'Minors' with fields: Minor Name (single line), Relevant Sectors (multipleSelects mirroring Employers Sector choices), Why It Helps (long text), Catalog URL (url), Last Verified (date). See design doc.
close_reason: Created Minors table tbl7naiwE8VdSLYAx with Minor Name, Relevant Sectors (mirrors Employers sectors), Why It Helps, Catalog URL, Last Verified

title: Suggested minors per sector (detail panel)
description: Surface DSU minor suggestions in the employer detail panel, keyed by Sector, sourced from a new Airtable 'Minors' table. See docs/plans/2026-06-09-suggested-minors-design.md.

title: Set GitHub default branch to main and prune merged branches
description: GitHub is showing feat/audio-directory-site as the default branch. Change the repository default branch to main and remove merged non-default branches that are no longer needed.
close_reason: Changed GitHub default branch to main and pruned merged feature branches locally and remotely.

title: Add launch sharing and contribution polish
description: Add a clearer correction/addition path, public audience/scope copy for DSU Digital Sound Design students, and favicon/social preview metadata before announcing the site.
close_reason: Added contribution path, DSU scope copy, and favicon/social preview metadata/assets.

title: Content cleanup + contact link
description: Trim extraneous text and internal data: remove topbar 'Verified <= today'; remove 'Handshake status' and 'Last verified' from the detail panel; omit 'Unknown' field values; drop redundant footer 'Audio Directory'; tighten brand subtitle. Add a feedback/contact mailto (tate.carson@dsu.edu) in the footer for reporting issues / requesting sectors.

title: Detail card: up/down arrow to navigate results
description: Add prev/next (up/down arrow) controls to the row detail sidebar so users can move through results without closing the card. Should respect the current filtered + sorted order (skip row-hidden rows), wrap or disable at ends, and support ArrowUp/ArrowDown keys while the panel is open. Update panel content in place. Implement in src/scripts/directory.ts + src/components/DetailPanel.astro.

title: Switching to Programs tab is slow
description: Navigating to /programs feels slower than it should. Investigate: in Astro dev mode each navigation re-runs build-time frontmatter, which calls the Airtable REST API (getPrograms + getEmployers for the tab count) on every request -> network latency per load. Confirm whether this is dev-only (production is static and should be instant). If it also affects prod builds, reduce per-page work (e.g. avoid fetching the other table just for a count; share/catch fetches).

title: Verify build + preview
description: Run dev server, verify both pages render verified records, filters work, no console errors. Screenshot.

title: Env + README walkthrough
description: .env.example, README with step-by-step: create Airtable PAT, scopes, base id, run dev/build.

title: Company-name click skips the detail panel
description: Clicking a company name goes straight offsite to the careers page; the guidance-rich detail panel is only discovered by clicking elsewhere in the row. Consider making name clicks open the panel (careers link already lives there). Needs Tate's call — changes a core affordance.

title: Collapse facet groups on mobile
description: With filters shown on mobile, the 29-item sector list is a wall. Make facet groups collapsible (e.g. details/summary or toggle) at small widths. FacetGroup.astro + global.css.

title: Rework Hiring Geography facet labels
description: 'Relocation Required / Midwest / Remote-Friendly' mix a demand, a region, and a perk as siblings; 'Relocation Required 169' reads like a warning. Decide better framing (e.g. group title 'Where you'd work' + clearer option labels) — copy decision for Tate, then trivial implementation.

title: Sector glossary / facet tooltips from Path Notes
description: Sector names (AV Systems Integration, Sonic Branding, Localization & Dubbing) have no explanation outside per-employer panels. Path Notes already exist in the Sectors table — surface a one-liner on facet hover/tap or a small glossary section. Larger design task.

title: Rank column reads as a ranking
description: The '#' column renumbers visible rows (01, 02...) implying a quality ranking when order is alphabetical. Options: drop the column, retitle, or add explicit sort controls (size / HQ / name). Needs Tate's call on direction before implementing.

title: Reconsider 'search by sector' in search placeholder
description: The search placeholder advertises searching by sector, but the sidebar already has sector filter buttons. The search blob is name + headquarters + sectors, so searching a sector returns the same set the Sector facet gives -- it does NOT surface cross-sector combinations (e.g. live-sound roles tagged Theme Parks) unless that row's own text already contains both terms. Decide: (a) drop 'sector' from the placeholder to avoid implying extra power, or (b) make search genuinely additive (e.g. include Notes/Entry-Level Roles in the search blob so it finds matches the facets can't), then keep the wording. Update placeholders in index.astro/programs.astro and the data-search builder accordingly.

title: Remove 'Verified records only' footer text
description: Remove the 'Audio Directory · Verified records only' text in the footer of src/pages/index.astro and src/pages/programs.astro (the .foot right-hand span).
